modelVersion.description: Hvigor model version. Required for API 12+. / Hvigor 模型版本，API 12+ 必需。Use 5.0.0 for API 12, 5.0.1 for API 13, 5.0.2 for API 14.

hvigorVersion.description: [Deprecated in API 12+] Hvigor tool version. / [API 12+ 已弃用] Hvigor 工具版本。

dependencies.description: Hvigor plugin dependencies / Hvigor 插件依赖

@ohos/hvigor-ohos-plugin.description: [Deprecated in API 12+] HarmonyOS build plugin version

execution.description: Build execution configuration / 构建执行配置

daemon.description: Enable daemon mode for faster builds / 启用守护进程模式加速构建

incremental.description: Enable incremental compilation / 启用增量编译

parallel.description: Enable parallel task execution / 启用并行任务执行

nodeOptions.description: Node.js runtime options / Node.js 运行时选项

maxOldSpaceSize.description: Max old generation heap size in MB
